data.description:
## Why
Epic 88ab (elfish-chair-lug) S4. Contributor + agent docs describe only the single-change amend loop; the feature-branch flow (branch creation, story loop, catch-up merges, merge-back with its sharp edges) must be documented, and any text implying single-change-only or PR-era GitHub practice must be found and fixed. Runs after S1–S3 lock the semantics being documented.

## What
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`: new "Multi-story features (feature branches)" section — branch creation request path (server-side, feature-branch-drivers), story loop targeting `refs/for/refs/heads/feature/<name>`, catch-up merge recipe, merge-back recipe with the commit-msg hook install as an EXPLICIT prerequisite step (`curl -sLo .git/hooks/commit-msg https://<host>/tools/hooks/commit-msg && chmod +x ...`) + the `GIT_EDITOR=/bin/true git commit --amend` Change-Id stamp + merge-conflict resolution guidance + how to abandon a bad merge change and start over; troubleshooting entries: pushMerge refusal, "missing Change-Id on merge push".
- `CLAUDE.md` Git-workflow section (~line 410): feature-branch flow + when-agents-should-use-it guidance (multi-agent parallel features vs single small changes), incl. the hook-install-in-fresh-worktree note.
- `README.md` + install docs (`docs/local-dev-env.md`, CONTRIBUTING one-time setup): verified current for the two-vote + feature-branch world.
- `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md`: cross-check after S1 edits.
- `infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md`: merge-change ops — 409 semantics, /rerun on merges, the S2 log signals ("signals to watch"), bot-code rollback = redeploy prior image.
- Repo-wide sweep: grep "pull request", "gh pr", "PR merge", single-change-only phrasing; record the hit list on this ticket; every hit fixed or justified.

## Scope
Documentation only — no code, no config. The semantics documented are S1–S3 outputs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md feature-branch section complete incl. hook prerequisite + both troubleshooting entries + conflict/abandon guidance
- [ ] CLAUDE.md agent guidance added (flow + when-to-use + fresh-worktree hook note)
- [ ] README + docs/local-dev-env.md + gerrit-aws-setup.md verified/updated
- [ ] review-bot-ops.md gains merge-change ops + signals-to-watch + rollback
- [ ] Sweep hit-list recorded on this ticket; zero unjustified hits remain
data.title: S4: Documentation — feature-branch workflow + repo-wide stale-practice sweep
